custom_mocks_needed.name: priceFeed
custom_mocks_needed.reason: AaveOracle requires Chainlink-compatible price feeds with specific decimals

tokens.name: underlyingAsset
tokens.role: Main asset for Hub and Spoke reserves
tokens.reason: Hub.addAsset and Spoke reserves require underlying ERC20 tokens

time_sensitive.reason: Hub uses block.timestamp for interest rate calculations and accrual; Spoke uses deadlines for permit/signature validation

multi_user.reason: Spoke has permitReserve and setUserPositionManagerWithSig functions requiring signature validation with known private key

struct_params.reason: Multiple Hub functions (addSpoke, updateSpokeConfig) use SpokeConfig with fields: addCap, drawCap, riskPremiumThreshold, active, paused
Hub.updateAssetConfig uses AssetConfig with fields: feeReceiver, liquidityFee, irStrategy, reinvestmentController
Multiple Spoke functions (addReserve, updateReserveConfig) use ReserveConfig with fields: collateralRisk, paused, frozen, borrowable, liquidatable, receiveSharesEnabled
Multiple Spoke functions (addDynamicReserveConfig, updateDynamicReserveConfig, addReserve) use DynamicReserveConfig with fields: collateralFactor, maxLiquidationBonus, liquidationFee
Spoke.updateLiquidationConfig uses LiquidationConfig with fields: targetHealthFactor, healthFactorForMaxBonus, liquidationBonusFactor
Multiple Hub functions (refreshPremium, reportDeficit, restore) use PremiumDelta with fields: sharesDelta, offsetRayDelta, restoredPremiumRay
